---
title: "circle2 and friends"
format: 
  html:
    embed-resources: true
---

This program was written by Steve Simon on 2026-04-29 and is placed in the public domain (CC0).

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| message: false
#| warning: false

library(tidyverse)
```

## circle2

The circleFun function is found at Stack Overflow

https://stackoverflow.com/questions/6862742/draw-a-circle-with-ggplot2

Also see 

https://ggplot2.tidyverse.org/reference/geom_tile.html

https://www.jstor.org/stable/24976032


```{r}
#| fig.width: 7
#| fig.height: 7
#| eval: false

draw_circles <- function(w, k) {
  x <- rep(-100:100, 201) / 100
  y <- rep(-100:100, each=201) / 100
  r <- x^2 + y^2
  z <- (r*w) %% 2 + 1
  n_circles <- ceiling(max(r*w)/2-0.2)
  # max(floor(r*w)) %/% 2

  z <- c("black", "white")[z]

  data.frame(x, y, z) |>
    ggplot() +
    aes(x=x, y=y) +
    geom_raster(fill=z) +
    labs(title=n_circles) +
    # geom_label(x=0, y=0, label=n) +
    theme_void() -> p
  
  print(w)
  print(p)
  
  file_name <- paste0(
    "../images/p", 
    str_pad(k, width=3, pad="0"),
    ".png")
  ggsave(file_name, width=201, height=301, unit="px")
}

n_images <- 900
for (k in 1:n_images) {
  w <- 1 + 200*(k-1)/(n_images-1)
  draw_circles(w, k)
}
```

```{r}
#| fig.width: 7
#| fig.height: 7

draw_diamonds <- function(w, k) {
  x <- rep(-100:100, 201) / 100
  y <- rep(-100:100, each=201) / 100
  r <- abs(x)*w + abs(y)*w
  z <- r^2 %% 2 + 1
  n_circles <- ceiling(max(r^2)/2-0.2)
  # max(floor(r*w)) %/% 2

  z <- c("black", "white")[z]

  data.frame(x, y, z) |>
    ggplot() +
    aes(x=x, y=y) +
    geom_raster(fill=z) +
    labs(title=n_circles) +
    # geom_label(x=0, y=0, label=n) +
    theme_void() -> p
  
  file_name <- paste0(
    "../images/d", 
    str_pad(k, width=3, pad="0"),
    ".png")
  ggsave(file_name, width=201, height=301, unit="px")
}

n_images <- 90
for (k in 1:n_images) {
  w <- 1 + 9*(k-1)/(n_images-1)
  draw_diamonds(w, k)
  cat(k)
  cat(" ")
}
```
